channel.title: Monitoring on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Monitoring on Systology

item.title: Model Serving & Inference
item.description: Principles for highly available production ML inference; utilizing immutable model registries, dynamic request micro-batching, safe canary rollouts, graceful fallback degradation, and efficient GPU memory management.

item.title: Global CDN Media Serving
item.description: A robust edge-optimized CDN-backed media delivery architecture; designed explicitly for seamless, highly available global media serving with completely decoupled background upload processing.

item.title: Search & Retrieval Engine
item.description: A high-performance search and retrieval engine architecture designed for extensive document and media collections; strictly ensuring low-latency ranking and horizontally scalable inverted indexing.

item.title: Chowist
item.description: A decade-spanning food discovery app migrated from Ruby Sinatra to Rails to Django. Lessons on incremental framework migrations and sustaining a single codebase through ecosystem shifts.

item.title: Mailprune
item.description: A highly effective, local-first email auditing and automated cleanup tool designed to definitively identify noisy senders and deliver actionable, strictly privacy-preserving recommendations.

item.title: Monitoring & Observability
item.description: Best practices for establishing robust observability using RED/USE metrics, contextual structured logging, distributed tracing, actionable alerting, and SLO-driven reliability engineering.

item.title: Web App
item.description: Guiding principles for production-ready web apps using 12-factor methodologies; encompassing stateless scaling, durable media handling, robust background processing, CI/CD, and deep observability.
